inputs.text: Main thaka hua mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar bhi hai, sir dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever, malaise, headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Similar symptoms can be seen in gastroenteritis, but absence of diarrhea makes it less likely

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although typhoid is a possibility, the symptoms are not specific enough to rank it higher at this stage

inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai, kabz bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever, abdominal pain, and constipation are indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Although gastroenteritis can cause abdominal pain, the presence of constipation and step-wise fever makes typhoid more likely

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the specific pattern of fever and abdominal symptoms

inputs.text: Ab mujhe tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho raha hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: High fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea, but the pattern of symptoms and presence of high fever makes typhoid more likely

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause high fever, but the absence of specific symptoms like chills and rigors makes it less likely

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, bukhar abhi tak hai, pet mein bahut dard hai
inputs.image_desc: patient on cot, unable to move

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged high fever, severe abdominal pain, and exhaustion are indicative of advanced typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific pattern of symptoms and presence of high fever

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of specific symptoms like chills and rigors
